mechanisms: Board pick writer — re-evaluate from syndicate_board
Stale claim reaper — auto-releases stuck outbox rows back to pending

proofs.notes: Multiple replay paths: promotion replay, rerun-promotion endpoint, requeue, retry-delivery, board re-evaluation, stale claim auto-recovery.

proofs.control: System can recover from partial failure

mechanisms: Atomic RPCs — either full commit or full rollback
Outbox pattern — delivery failure does not lose the message
Stale claim reaper — releases stuck rows after 5min
Circuit breaker — auto-disables failing target, auto-recovers after cooldown
Dead letter — permanent failures surfaced for manual review

proofs.notes: Atomic RPCs prevent partial state. Outbox preserves messages on failure. Stale reaper recovers stuck claims. Circuit breaker auto-recovers. Dead letter captures permanent failures.

proofs.control: Operator runbooks exist for critical failures
proofs.notes: 118 operational docs in docs/05_operations/. 6+ ops scripts for runtime management. 4 Claude skills for operational procedures.

proofs.control: Manual override paths are defined and audited

evidence.audit_on_override: All override endpoints record audit_log with actor=operator
evidence.governance_brake: Phase 7A brake blocks auto-routing; operator review is the only exit path

proofs.notes: Override endpoints: review, override-promotion, requeue, retry-delivery. All audited with actor attribution. Governance brake forces manual review for autonomous sources.
